name: anarchive
description: A quiet shelf for everything you copy.
author: ~Fre

scripts.predev: pkill -f 'Anarchive/node_modules/electron/dist/Electron' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'Anarchive.*electron-vite' 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const deps=p.resolve('node_modules','.vite','deps');try{if(fs.existsSync(deps)){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(deps))if(e.startsWith('deps_temp_')||e.endsWith('.lock'))fs.rmSync(p.join(deps,e),{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('[predev] .vite/deps partial files cleared');}}catch(e){console.warn('[predev] cache clear skipped:',e.message);}"
